---
title: "Projects"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true           # This enables the "On this page" sidebar
    toc-title: "Index"  # Renames "On this page" to "Index"
    toc-depth: 2        # Tells it to look at your ## Headings
page-layout: full
---

Here is a collection of my recent work. Scroll down to view them all.

---

{{< include projects/analysis-01.qmd >}}

---

{{< include projects/analysis-02.qmd >}}

---
